home.title: TAROT DE PI
home.subtitle: Discover your destiny through the cards of tarot
home.placeholder: What do you wish to ask?...

pi_simple_5.name: 5-Card Spread
pi_simple_5.description: 5 cards revealing mind, roots, past, present, and future.

pi_rapida_3.name: Quick Reading
pi_rapida_3.description: 3 cards in a row: Past, Present, Future.

pi_sino_1.name: Yes or No
pi_sino_1.description: 1 single card for a direct answer.

reading.error: The Oracle is silent... energies are not flowing.

00-thefool.name: The Fool
00-thefool.info:
NEW BEGINNINGS • INSTINCT • UNCERTAINTY

It represents the start of a spiritual journey without maps, fears, or the baggage of the past. It urges you to trust blindly in your intuition, embrace chaos with a clear mind, and take a leap of faith into the unknown.

ADVICE: Shed the established norms and dare to walk the edge of the precipice; the universe will support your steps.

01-themagician.name: The Magician
01-themagician.info:
MANIFESTATION • POWER • WILLPOWER

You have all the elemental tools at your disposal: mind, emotion, body, and spirit. You possess the talent and resources needed to shape your reality through focus and concentration.

ADVICE: Channel your attention without distraction and act with total determination. You are the architect of your own destiny.

02-thehighpriestess.name: The High Priestess
02-thehighpriestess.info:
INTUITION • MYSTERY • HIDDEN KNOWLEDGE

The material world must take a backseat. It is a time for sacred silence and for listening to the truth whispered by your inner voice rather than constantly forcing external events.

ADVICE: Do not seek to act in the physical world; trust your hunches and connect with the wisdom of your subconscious.

03-theempress.name: The Empress
03-theempress.info:
ABUNDANCE • CREATIVITY • VITAL ENERGY

Nature is blooming around you and your projects are ripe to bear stable fruit. This card invites you to connect with the pleasure of the senses and to enhance your innate capacity to nurture new things.

ADVICE: Surround yourself with beauty, care for your body, and allow yourself to receive the prosperity that the universe wants to pour upon you.

04-theemperor.name: The Emperor
04-theemperor.info:
STRUCTURE • AUTHORITY • STABILITY

The time has come to bring order to chaos, exercise your leadership with justice, and build solid foundations that will withstand any future storm through discipline and logic.

ADVICE: Define your boundaries with absolute clarity and organize your resources. Master the circumstances with a cool head.

05-thehierophant.name: The Hierophant
05-thehierophant.info:
TRADITION • WISDOM • SPIRITUAL GUIDANCE

This card invites you to seek wise counsel in philosophy, tradition, or experienced mentors. It is a period of deep learning and conscious alignment with universal laws.

ADVICE: Do not try to break the rules or reinvent the wheel at this time; find your place within the structure.

06-thelovers.name: The Lovers
06-thelovers.info:
CROSSROADS • VALUES • ALIGNMENT

It represents a profound and crucial decision that must be made with an open heart, staying strictly true to your essence. It is time to choose which path you will truly walk from now on.

ADVICE: Harmonize your internal contradictions and commit yourself. The choice you make will define your future spiritual peace.

07-thechariot.name: The Chariot
07-thechariot.info:
VICTORY • DETERMINATION • CONTROL

You are in a position of power, but to triumph, you must coordinate the opposing forces that threaten to destabilize you. Move toward your goal without letting doubt slow you down.

ADVICE: Keep a firm grip on the reins and focus all your energy on the ultimate goal. Success is within your reach.

08-strength.name: Strength
08-strength.info:
INNER COURAGE • RESILIENCE • COMPASSION

Your true power lies not in aggression, but in your ability to tame your own shadows, fears, and wild passions using infinite patience, self-control, and self-love.

ADVICE: Face your problems with a tempered heart and remember that true strength consists of remaining calm.

09-thehermit.name: The Hermit
09-thehermit.info:
INTROSPECTION • RETREAT • MATURITY

It is imperative that you step away for a while from the worldly noise and the opinions of others to light your own inner lamp. The answers you urgently need are waiting in the silence.

ADVICE: Walk slowly, reflect on your past experiences with detachment, and seek the truth within.

10-wheeloffortune.name: Wheel of Fortune
10-wheeloffortune.info:
CHANGE • DESTINY • IMPERMANENCE

Life is constantly turning and reminds you that what is at the peak today will descend tomorrow. Do not try to resist the mutations of reality; instead, adapt fluidly to the new rhythm.

ADVICE: Keep your spiritual center unshakable, knowing that every movement of destiny has a higher purpose.

11-justice.name: Justice
11-justice.info:
KARMA • BALANCE • HONESTY

You are at a moment of accountability where you will reap with mathematical precision what you have sown. Evaluate your current situation with a cold, analytical mind free of emotional bias.

ADVICE: Act with unwavering righteousness and take responsibility; truth will prevail over deception.

12-thehangedman.name: The Hanged Man
12-thehangedman.info:
PAUSE • PERSPECTIVE • SURRENDER

Moving forward by force at this time is useless. The only real way out is to stop completely, let go of the obsessive need for control, and accept looking at the world from an entirely new angle.

ADVICE: Do not see this as a punishing stagnation; the perfect solutions will arrive when you stop struggling.

13-death.name: Death
13-death.info:
TRANSFORMATION • REBIRTH • TRANSITION

This card announces the definitive end of a stage or an outdated mental structure that no longer serves your evolution. You must allow the old to die to clear the ground and make room for the seeds of the future.

ADVICE: Do not resist the end of the cycle; say goodbye to the past with gratitude and prepare to rise from your ashes.

14-temperance.name: Temperance
14-temperance.info:
ALCHEMY • MODERATION • PATIENCE

This card invites you to blend the different aspects of your life with extreme calm and diplomacy. It is a time to heal wounds through the reconciliation of your polarities and inner peace.

ADVICE: Avoid destructive extremes, flow with circumstances like water, and allow your energy to be restored.

15-thedevil.name: The Devil
15-thedevil.info:
ATTACHMENT • SHADOW • MATERIAL ILLUSION

An urgent wake-up call to face your emotional dependencies, obsessions, or toxic dynamics. You are the one holding the shackles out of fear of losing false security or fleeting pleasures.

ADVICE: Become fully aware of your hidden shadows without judgment and break the mental prisons you built yourself.

16-thetower.name: The Tower
16-thetower.info:
LIBERATION • UPHEAVAL • TRUTH

Structures based on ego or false foundations will be destroyed by a bolt of divine truth. Although the impact is chaotic, it is a necessary act of cosmic grace to release you from your prison.

ADVICE: The walls fall to let you see the open sky; upon the ruins, you will find the truth to rebuild yourself.

17-thestar.name: The Star
17-thestar.info:
HOPE • HEALING • INSPIRATION

The worst part of the storm is behind you. A current of divine inspiration, inner peace, and cosmic protection now lights your path, inviting you to trust fully in the future.

ADVICE: Open your heart, share your gifts generously, and be certain that you are being guided toward renewal.

18-themoon.name: The Moon
18-themoon.info:
SUBCONSCIOUS • ILLUSION • UNCERTAINTY

You are moving through a phase of twilight where things are not what they seem. Pay attention to your anxieties and distorted projections, using this period to sharpen your psychic perception.

ADVICE: Walk with extreme caution and trust your intuitive radar; do not make major decisions until the fog clears.

19-thesun.name: The Sun
19-thesun.info:
CLARITY • SUCCESS • VITALITY

The divine light of truth illuminates everything in your path, dispelling any trace of doubt or confusion. It brings abundance, health, and sincere relationships based on transparency and joy.

ADVICE: Shine with your own light without fear, share your warmth with the world, and fully enjoy your moment.

20-judgement.name: Judgement
20-judgement.info:
AWAKENING • REDEMPTION • RENEWAL

You have reached a moment of epiphany where you are invited to forgive your past mistakes and listen to the urgent call of your soul. Shed your old garments and embrace your spiritual identity.

ADVICE: Rise courageously to this cosmic call; a completely new existence is waiting for you.

21-theworld.name: The World
21-theworld.info:
COMPLETION • FULFILLMENT • CULMINATION

You have successfully completed the great journey of the soul; all lessons have been integrated and the universe is in perfect harmony with you. It represents well-deserved recognition and ultimate peace.

ADVICE: Enjoy the goal achieved with legitimate pride and deep gratitude; the whole world is at your feet.
